calendar.matters:
MASTER CALENDAR JURY
Off Calendar Aug-25-2008 Assigned To Trial Court

COURT TRIAL
Off Calendar Aug-25-2008 Text Ruling
MINI MINUTES: This matter comes on calendar this day, having been assigned from the Presiding Judge Dept. 206 for Court Trial/Prove-Up Hearing. Commissioner Frank Drago, Clerk: Kevin Dougherty, Reporter: Linda Forster, CSR #13286.

Plaintiff Nasir Patel was present in pro per, placed under oath and examined.
Defendant Larry William Hutchinson was present in pro per, placed under oath and examined.
Notice of Time and Placed of Trial was filed on August 7, 2008.

The Settlement Agreement reached by the parties was read into the record by Mr. Patel. In accordance with the terms of said agreement, on or before September 1, 2008 at 5:00 p.m., defendant Larry William Hutchinson shall vacate the premises located at 1040 Folsom Street, #24, San Francisco, CA 94103. In exchange, plaintiff Nasir Patel will dismiss this action with prejudice.

If defendant Larry William Hutchinson fails to comply with the terms of the Settlement Agreement set forth above, plaintiff may obtain Entry of Judgment in the amount of $1,430.00 on ex parte application, with 24 hours notice to defendant. Plaintiff shall be entitled to restitution and possession of the above-mentioned premises

Settlement Agreement reached by the parties is approved by the Court.

OTHER SETTLEMENT CONFERENCE
Off Calendar Aug-20-2008 Off Calendar
